**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Beijiao Rail Transit New Materials Technology Co., Ltd. exhibits the profile of a highly specialized IP-holding or R&D vehicle, rather than a primary manufacturer. While claiming to produce heavy-industry 'high-speed train forged steel brake discs', it reported 0 insured employees in 2024 despite a fully paid-in capital of 10 million RMB. The company name 'Beijiao' strongly implies an affiliation with Beijing Jiaotong University (a premier rail transit institution in China), acting as a commercialization or project-bidding node. Furthermore, the use of corporate email domains (@nddchina.com) instead of purely personal ones suggests it is part of a larger corporate network. Actual manufacturing is likely handled by an unlisted parent factory or outsourced partner.
